Subject: AI & Careers — SDT paper + two pilot options (PM‑first)

What I’ll send

Two pilot options (pick one to start)
1) AI & Careers Myth‑Busting (short weekly): 1 case/week where we replace hype with a concrete workflow and before/after results from PM contexts.  [ref: #/topics/2]
2) “Base Athleticism” Toolkit (4‑week micro‑series): crisp exercises for communication, feedback loops, and relationship leverage that compound on the job.  [ref: #/topics/1]

If you’re open to it, can we book 30 minutes next week to choose a pilot, define success (1–2 metrics), and agree the first deliverable? I’ll send the SDT doc immediately and draft the 1‑pager so we can react to something concrete.  [refs: #/ctas/3, #/ctas/4]
